title: Discontinued CB2 Solid Wood Bench – Architectural Minimal Styl
description:
Solid wood CB2 dining bench with a clean, modern minimalist design. Thick slab seat and sturdy construction — very solid and well-made.

Works great as a dining bench, entry bench, or accent piece.

Condition: good overall. Minor signs of use consistent with normal wear (see photos).

This style is no longer sold, making it a great find if you like CB2’s older, heavier wood pieces.
